spring-boot-actuator/src/main/java/com/a.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.

spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Replace the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 6 requirements for Java 21/Spring Boot 3.
spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean protected SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Update authorization configuration to use the new authorizeHttpRequests API with lambda syntax instead of the deprecated authorizeRequests.
Update form login configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL instead of the deprecated builder methods.
Update logout configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL.
Update HTTP Basic configuration to use the new Customizer.withDefaults() pattern.
Update CSRF configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL and ignoringRequestMatchers method.
